_meta.description: Complete static LLPA config extracted from SWMC rate sheet XLSX. All adjustment sections.
_meta.notes: SWMC uses positive=cost convention. FICO "<=639 or NTC" is the lowest tier for agency. Non-QM uses CLTV instead of LTV.
